briefdescription.para: The side of the margin.
Default construct with uninitialized values (useful for aggregate-style construction).
Construct margins with the same value on all sides.

parameterdescription.para: Value applied to top, right, bottom and left.

briefdescription.para: Construct margins with separate horizontal and vertical values.

parameterdescription.para: Value applied to left and right.
Value applied to top and bottom.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Coordinate top, const Coordinate right, const Coordinate bottom, const Coordinate left)
memberdef.name: Margins

briefdescription.para: Construct margins with individually specified sides.
Equality comparison (all sides must be equal).
Inequality comparison.
Unary negation producing margins with all sides negated.

detaileddescription.para: Useful for reversing an inset/expansion operation.

briefdescription.para: Get the margin at the given side.
Get top margin.
Set the top margin.
Get the right margin.
Set the right margin.
Get the bottom margin.
Set the bottom margin.
Get the left margin.
Set the left margin.
Get the margin at the given side.
Set the margin at the given side.
Get the leading margin for an orientation.
Get the trailing margin for an orientation.
Get the leading cross-axis margin for an orientation.
Get the trailing cross-axis margin for an orientation.
Get a new object with only the horizontal margins preserved.
Get a new object with only the vertical margins preserved.
Get the positive horizontal extent consumed by the margins.

simplesect.para: left() + right() with negative sides treated as zero.

briefdescription.para: Get the positive vertical extent consumed by the margins.

simplesect.para: top() + bottom() with negative sides treated as zero.

briefdescription.para: Get the positive extent consumed by the margins.

simplesect.para: A size containing the horizontal and vertical extents.

briefdescription.para: Get the extent for the selected orientation.

parameterdescription.para: The orientation that selects horizontal or vertical extent.

briefdescription.para: Get the horizontal spacing represented by the larger positive horizontal side.
Get the vertical spacing represented by the larger positive vertical side.
Get the spacing represented by the margins.

simplesect.para: A size containing horizontal and vertical spacing.

briefdescription.para: Get the spacing for the selected orientation.

parameterdescription.para: The orientation that selects horizontal or vertical spacing.

briefdescription.para: Get the horizontal delta caused by positive or negative margins.

detaileddescription.para: Saturation addition limits the value to the Coordinate range.

briefdescription.para: Get the vertical delta caused by positive or negative margins.

detaileddescription.para: Saturation addition limits the value to the Coordinate range.

briefdescription.para: Get the delta for the given axis.
Expand all sides so they are at least the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Orientation orientation) noexcept
memberdef.name: expandTo

briefdescription.para: Expand the margins along one axis so they are at least the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Side side) noexcept
memberdef.name: expandTo

briefdescription.para: Expand one side so it is at least the matching side in another margin set.
Limit all sides to zero or positive values.
Limit all sides so they are at most the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Orientation orientation) noexcept
memberdef.name: limitTo

briefdescription.para: Limit the margins along one axis so they are at most the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Side side) noexcept
memberdef.name: limitTo

briefdescription.para: Limit one side so it is at most the matching side in another margin set.
Create a copy expanded so all sides are at least the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Orientation orientation) const noexcept
memberdef.name: expandedWith

briefdescription.para: Create a copy expanded on one axis so both sides are at least the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Side side) const noexcept
memberdef.name: expandedWith

briefdescription.para: Create a copy expanded on one side so it is at least the matching side in another margin set.
Create a copy expanding with all sides to zero or positive values.
Create a copy limited so all sides are at most the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Orientation orientation) const noexcept
memberdef.name: limitedWith

briefdescription.para: Create a copy limited on one axis so both sides are at most the matching sides in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Side side) const noexcept
memberdef.name: limitedWith

briefdescription.para: Create a copy limited on one side so it is at most the matching side in another margin set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Side side) const noexcept
memberdef.name: componentMax

memberdef.argsstring: (const Margins other, const Side side) const noexcept
memberdef.name: componentMin

briefdescription.para: Get the leading side for an orientation.
Get the trailing side for an orientation.
Get the leading cross-axis side for an orientation.
Get the trailing cross-axis side for an orientation.
Represents margins (top, right, bottom, left) around a rectangle.

listitem.para: Immutable-like value type for representing margins, padding, or insets.
In UI themes, margins are parent-owned outside space, while padding is part-owned inside space.
Provides convenience constructors for uniform or symmetric margins.
